full_title: Comparative efficacy of racemic ketamine and esketamine for depression: A systematic review and meta-analysis

search.pubmed_query: (("ketamine"[MeSH Terms] OR "ketamine"[Title/Abstract] OR "esketamine"[Title/Abstract] OR "arketamine"[Title/Abstract] OR "Spravato"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("depression"[MeSH Terms] OR "depressive disorder"[MeSH Terms] OR "depressive disorder, treatment-resistant"[MeSH Terms] OR "depression"[Title/Abstract] OR "depressive"[Title/Abstract] OR "major depressive disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment-resistant depression"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment resistant depression"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomised"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized"[Title/Abstract] OR "placebo"[Title/Abstract] OR "double-blind"[Title/Abstract])) AND ("1966/01/01"[PDAT] : "2019/12/31"[PDAT])
search.notes: Reconstructed from Bahji 2021 Appendix 1 (PubMed strategy). Original Appendix 1 shows: Step 1 ketamine.mp OR exp Ketamine, Step 2 depression.mp OR exp Depression, Step 3 = 1 AND 2, Step 4 limit to humans, Step 5 limit to RCTs. This reconstruction uses MeSH + free-text equivalents. Also searched Embase, PsycINFO, Cochrane CENTRAL, ClinicalTrials.gov, EU CTR, ANZCTR.

inclusion_criteria.population: Adults with unipolar or bipolar major depression
inclusion_criteria.intervention: Racemic ketamine or esketamine (any route of administration)
inclusion_criteria.comparator: Placebo, active placebo (e.g., midazolam), or active comparator

exclusion_criteria: Observational studies, case reports, case series
Studies not using ketamine or esketamine as primary intervention
Studies in non-depressive psychiatric conditions only
